title: Fix: Race condition in cache invalidation
original_text: Fixed race condition in cache invalidation. Cache was being invalidated before data was written. Implemented proper cache update ordering. Added cache locking mechanism. Added cache consistency checks. Result: cache consistency maintained.
expected_subject: fix(cache): fix race condition in cache invalidation
expected_body_lines: - Fix cache invalidated before data write
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(cache): fix race condition in cache invalidation"
